entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SNOW SHOWERS THIS EVENING
NOT AS COOL
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 30S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, INCREASING TO 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF SNOW 20 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN CLEARING
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
LOWS IN THE MID 30S
